common.footerLine: You're receiving this email from {brand}. Manage notification preferences in your <accountSettings>account settings</accountSettings>.
common.automatedNotice: This is an automated notification from the platform.

invite.subject: You're invited to join {brand} as a {role}
invite.title: You're invited to {brand}
invite.callToAction: Accept your invite and set a password:

passwordReset.subject: Reset your {brand} password
passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.intro: Someone requested a password reset for your {brand} account. If this was you, open the link below to choose a new password. The link expires in 1 hour.
passwordReset.ignoreNotice: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

emailVerification.subject: Verify your {brand} email address
emailVerification.title: Verify your email
emailVerification.intro: Confirm this is your email address so we can send you account notifications. The link expires in 24 hours.
emailVerification.ignoreNotice: If you didn't change your email on {brand}, you can safely ignore this message — your account stays on the previous address.

addedToTeam.subject: You've been added to {teamName} on {brand}
addedToTeam.title: Welcome to {teamName}
addedToTeam.intro: {inviterName} added you to the team {teamName} on {brand} as a {teamRole}.
addedToTeam.callToAction: Sign in to see the team's assignments:

monthlyInvoiceReminder.subject: Invoices due — {monthLabel}
monthlyInvoiceReminder.title: Invoices due — {monthLabel}
monthlyInvoiceReminder.preview: Heads up: it's the end of {monthLabel}.
monthlyInvoiceReminder.body: Heads up: it's the end of {monthLabel}. Review the completed assignments for this month and generate invoices for any that are still open.
monthlyInvoiceReminder.footerNote: You're getting this as the platform's billing contact.

contactSubmission.subject: New contact: {name}
contactSubmission.title: New contact form submission
contactSubmission.preview: {name} got in touch via the website
contactSubmission.intro: Someone just submitted the contact form on immoplatform.be:
contactSubmission.replyNotice: Reply to this email goes straight to {email}.

assignmentDateUpdated.subject: Date changed: {address} ({reference})
assignmentDateUpdated.title: Planned date changed
assignmentDateUpdated.body: The planned date for {reference} ({address}) has changed.

assignmentDelivered.subject: Delivered: {address} ({reference})
assignmentDelivered.title: Assignment delivered
assignmentDelivered.bodyWithFreelancer: {actorName} marked {freelancerName}'s inspection at {address} ({reference}) as delivered. Review the files and sign off when you're ready.
assignmentDelivered.bodyDirect: {actorName} marked the inspection at {address} ({reference}) as delivered. Review the files and sign off when you're ready.

assignmentCompleted.subject: Completed: {address} ({reference})
assignmentCompleted.title: Assignment completed
assignmentCompleted.body: {completedByName} signed off on {reference} ({address}). It's now closed and moves out of the active queue.

assignmentReassigned.subject: New inspection: {address} ({reference})
assignmentReassigned.title: You've been assigned to a new inspection

assignmentUnassigned.subject: Unassigned: {address} ({reference})
assignmentUnassigned.title: Removed from an assignment
assignmentUnassigned.body: You've been removed from {reference} ({address}). No action needed on your side.

odooSyncFailed.subject: Odoo sync failed — {address}
odooSyncFailed.title: Odoo sync failed
odooSyncFailed.intro: Odoo synchronization for the following assignment has failed. Click through to the dashboard to retry once the underlying issue is resolved.

assignment.calendarPrompt: Add this appointment to your Google calendar:
